'''chojadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthochromatic|xanthochromatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthochromatic|xanthochromatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chojadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chojadithi|chojadithi]] || [[word:chojadiji|chojadiji]] || [[word:chojadishi|chojadishi]] || [[word:chojadiki|chojadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chojaduthuthu|chojaduthuthu]] || [[word:chojadujuju|chojadujuju]] || [[word:chojadushushu|chojadushushu]] || [[word:chojadukuku|chojadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chojaduthu|chojaduthu]] || [[word:chojaduju|chojaduju]] || [[word:chojadushu|chojadushu]] || [[word:chojaduku|chojaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chojadufthuf|chojadufthuf]] || [[word:chojadufjuf|chojadufjuf]] || [[word:chojadufshuf|chojadufshuf]] || [[word:chojadufkuf|chojadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chojadethe|chojadethe]] || [[word:chojadeje|chojadeje]] || [[word:chojadeshe|chojadeshe]] || [[word:chojadeke|chojadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chojadothotho|chojadothotho]] || [[word:chojadojojo|chojadojojo]] || [[word:chojadoshosho|chojadoshosho]] || [[word:chojadokoko|chojadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chojadotho|chojadotho]] || [[word:chojadojo|chojadojo]] || [[word:chojadosho|chojadosho]] || [[word:chojadoko|chojadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chojadofthof|chojadofthof]] || [[word:chojadofjof|chojadofjof]] || [[word:chojadofshof|chojadofshof]] || [[word:chojadofkof|chojadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfthĂŻf|chojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfjĂŻf|chojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfshĂŻf|chojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfkĂŻf|chojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chojadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chojadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chojadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chojadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfthĂŻf|chojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfjĂŻf|chojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfshĂŻf|chojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfkĂŻf|chojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfthĂŻf|chojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfjĂŻf|chojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfshĂŻf|chojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chojadĂŻfkĂŻf|chojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chojadĂŠthĂŠ|chojadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chojadĂŠjĂŠ|chojadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chojadĂŠshĂŠ|chojadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chojadĂŠkĂŠ|chojadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chojadathatha|chojadathatha]] || [[word:chojadajaja|chojadajaja]] || [[word:chojadashasha|chojadashasha]] || [[word:chojadakaka|chojadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chojadatha|chojadatha]] || [[word:chojadaja|chojadaja]] || [[word:chojadasha|chojadasha]] || [[word:chojadaka|chojadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chojadafthaf|chojadafthaf]] || [[word:chojadafjaf|chojadafjaf]] || [[word:chojadafshaf|chojadafshaf]] || [[word:chojadafkaf|chojadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chojadasha|chojadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chojadshĂ«asha|chojadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chojadroasha|chojadroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chojadmuasha|chojadmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chojadyaasha|chojadyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochojadnkshĂ«asha|gochojadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochojadnkroasha|gochojadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochojadnkmuasha|gochojadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochojadnkyaasha|gochojadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chojajadasha|chojajadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chojajadshĂ«asha|chojajadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chojajadroasha|chojajadroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chojajadmuasha|chojajadmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chojajadyaasha|chojajadyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochojajadnkshĂ«asha|gochojajadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochojajadnkroasha|gochojajadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochojajadnkmuasha|gochojajadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochojajadnkyaasha|gochojajadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chejĂŠdasha|chejĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chejĂŠdshĂ«asha|chejĂŠdshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chejĂŠdroasha|chejĂŠdroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chejĂŠdmuasha|chejĂŠdmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chejĂŠdyaasha|chejĂŠdyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochejĂŠdnkshĂ«asha|gochejĂŠdnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochejĂŠdnkroasha|gochejĂŠdnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochejĂŠdnkmuasha|gochejĂŠdnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochejĂŠdnkyaasha|gochejĂŠdnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chojfadasha|chojfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chojfadshĂ«asha|chojfadshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chojfadroasha|chojfadroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chojfadmuasha|chojfadmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chojfadyaasha|chojfadyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochojfadnkshĂ«asha|gochojfadnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochojfadnkroasha|gochojfadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochojfadnkmuasha|gochojfadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochojfadnkyaasha|gochojfadnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
